title: PrimaryReinforcingBar
description: PrimaryReinforcingBar: Defining reinforcement running along the element.

CentreCurve.description: Centreline of the Reinforcing bar in three-dimensional space. When the BendRadius is sufficient for any kinks in the rebar, this can be defined as a polyline, ommiting any arcs in corners. ICurve: The interface for all one-dimensional geometrical objects.

Diameter.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

BendRadius.description: Bend radius used for any discontinuities in the CentreCurve. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
